_doc: Wrap a phase-difference value to be signed around the OFFSET target (in degrees). With OFFSET=90 this re-centres an I-Q phase difference around 0: result = D-90 (if D>0) else D+270. Useful for spec-checking quadrature accuracy.
name: phase_diff_wrap

params.doc: Upstream output (e.g. a phase-difference computed elsewhere).
Expected nominal phase offset in degrees.
